title: Pillar Security Platform
description:
Pillar provides holistic AI security through discovery and mapping of models, prompts, tools, 
agents, datasets, MCP servers, and third-party components, enabling effective and customized AI-SPM, Red Teaming, and Runtime Protection for agentic systems.

items: Perform SAST/DAST on agent planning code, tool wrappers, & plugin interfaces.
Implement policy enforcement hooks in Frameworks (e.g.
Generate & verify model + agent + tool SBOMs - shared responsibility, Register all agents in an internal trust registry
Enforce zero-trust policies between agents, tools, & external APIs, Apply & manage runtime Guardrails, Configure Inter-agent authorization policies, capabilities, & roles
Monitor agent memory mutation patterns for drift, Continuously scan loaded plugins for CVEs & privilege escalation vectors.
LLM Incident Detection & Response, Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
Enforce role- & task-based access policies across agent populations & their tool access.
Align control evidence with frameworks like EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, & ISO/IEC 42001.
Automate goal alignment audits, including adversarial review of long-term agent memory.
